SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web

Class DashboardMetricsController

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web.DashboardMetricsController
@RestController @RequestMapping("${failover.dashboard.base-path:/failover-dashboard}/api") public class DashboardMetricsController extends Object
Read-only metrics endpoints, mapped under the same base-path/api namespace as the config API.

Registered only when a MeterRegistry is present: without Micrometer the config view still works and the metrics view degrades gracefully (design doc §3).

The figures are obtained through a MetricsSource rather than the registry directly, so the same endpoints can be backed by a single instance (default) or a cluster-wide aggregate (see the distributed-dashboard design). /metrics/source exposes that provenance for the UI badge.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Constructor Details

    • DashboardMetricsController

      public DashboardMetricsController(MetricsSource metricsSource)

  • Method Details

    • metrics

      @GetMapping("/metrics") public MetricsSummary metrics()

    • health

      @GetMapping("/health") public List<ApiHealth> health()

    • source

      @GetMapping("/metrics/source") public SourceInfo source()
      Provenance of the metrics (mode, instances reporting, freshness) for the UI source badge.

    • series

      @GetMapping("/metrics/series") public List<SeriesPoint> series(@RequestParam(name="windowSec",defaultValue="300") long windowSec)
      Trend samples for the timeline chart. Local mode serves the in-memory ring (empty when history is disabled); Prometheus mode derives a cluster-wide, reload-surviving trend via query_range.
      Parameters:
      windowSec - only samples within this many seconds of now (<= 0 ⇒ all retained)

    • instances

      @GetMapping("/instances") public List<InstanceMetrics> instances()
      Per-instance metrics for the cluster Instances view — one entry per reporting member. Empty for sources without a per-instance dimension (the UI then hides the Instances tab).
